testcase.name: test_14_01_budget_correctness_every_forward_step

failure.message: section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts: shape=(2, 12), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] shape=(2, 12, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 shape=(12, 2), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] shape=(12, 2, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 shape=(2, 12, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one shape=(12, 2, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one shape=(2, 12, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 shape=(12, 2, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 shape=(2, 12, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64 shape=(12, 2, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64

testcase.failure:
def test_14_01_budget_correctness_every_forward_step() -> None: budget = 4 model = build_model(seed=2026, budget=budget) model.eval() encourage_writes(model) > x = compatible_input(model, seq_len=12) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_section14_required.py:72: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
model = BudgetMemR( (recurrent_cell): GRUCell(8, 16) (key_projection): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=8, bias=False) ...ures=64, bias=True) (1): SiLU() (2): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=1, bias=True) (3): Sigmoid() ) ) seq_len = 12
def compatible_input(model: nn.Module, seq_len: int = 12) -> Tensor: failures: list[str] = [] attempted: set[tuple[tuple[int, ...], torch.dtype]] = set() inferred_dimensions: list[int] = []
def try_input(x: Tensor) -> Tensor | None: key = (tuple(x.shape), x.dtype) if key in attempted: return None attempted.add(key) try: reset_memory(model, require=False) with torch.no_grad(): invoke(model, x, reset=True) return x except Exception as exc: message = f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}" failures.append( f"shape={tuple(x.shape)}, dtype={x.dtype}: {message}" ) patterns = ( r"Expected input_dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"expected input[_ ]dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"input_dim\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", r"input_size\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", ) for pattern in patterns: match = re.search(pattern, message, flags=re.IGNORECASE) if match: inferred_dimensions.append(int(match.group(1))) return None
for candidate in _candidate_inputs(model, seq_len=seq_len): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
dimensions = list(dict.fromkeys([*inferred_dimensions, 8, 16, 32, 64])) for feature_dim in dimensions: for candidate in ( torch.randn(2, seq_len, feature_dim), torch.randn(seq_len, 2, feature_dim), ): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
> raise Section14DiscoveryError( "No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts:\n" + "\n".join(failures) ) E section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts: E shape=(2, 12), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(2, 12, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(12, 2), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(12, 2, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(2, 12, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one E shape=(12, 2, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one E shape=(2, 12, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(12, 2, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(2, 12, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64 E shape=(12, 2, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64
tests/section14_runtime.py:475: Section14DiscoveryError

testcase.name: test_14_02_causality_future_tokens_do_not_change_earlier_steps

failure.message: AssertionError: Causality could not be evaluated because neither sequence-aligned model outputs nor sequence-aligned controller decisions were exposed. assert False

testcase.failure:
def test_14_02_causality_future_tokens_do_not_change_earlier_steps() -> None: seed = 2026 model_a = build_model(seed=seed, budget=4) model_b = build_model(seed=seed, budget=4) assert state_dict_equal(model_a, model_b), "Models are not identically initialized."
model_a.eval() model_b.eval() x = compatible_input(model_a, seq_len=12) seq_len = _sequence_length(x) prefix_len = max(2, seq_len // 2) changed = mutate_suffix(x, prefix_len)
reset_memory(model_a, require=False) output_a, decisions_a = capture_controller_outputs(model_a, x) reset_memory(model_b, require=False) output_b, decisions_b = capture_controller_outputs(model_b, changed)
tensor_a = extract_tensor(output_a) tensor_b = extract_tensor(output_b) compared = False
if tensor_a is not None and tensor_b is not None: prefix_a = sequence_prefix(tensor_a, seq_len, prefix_len) prefix_b = sequence_prefix(tensor_b, seq_len, prefix_len) if prefix_a is not None and prefix_b is not None: assert torch.equal(prefix_a.cpu(), prefix_b.cpu()), ( "Changing future tokens changed model outputs at earlier time steps." ) compared = True
for left, right in zip(decisions_a, decisions_b, strict=False): axis_left = infer_sequence_axis(left, seq_len) axis_right = infer_sequence_axis(right, seq_len) if axis_left is None or axis_right is None: continue prefix_left = sequence_prefix(left, seq_len, prefix_len) prefix_right = sequence_prefix(right, seq_len, prefix_len) if prefix_left is not None and prefix_right is not None: assert torch.equal(prefix_left, prefix_right), ( "Changing future tokens changed controller decisions at earlier steps." ) compared = True
> assert compared, ( "Causality could not be evaluated because neither sequence-aligned model outputs " "nor sequence-aligned controller decisions were exposed." ) E AssertionError: Causality could not be evaluated because neither sequence-aligned model outputs nor sequence-aligned controller decisions were exposed. E assert False
tests/test_section14_required.py:137: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_14_03_deterministic_dataset_generation
testcase.failure:
def test_14_03_deterministic_dataset_generation() -> None: try: first = build_synthetic_dataset(seed=2026, split="train") second = build_synthetic_dataset(seed=2026, split="train") except Section14DiscoveryError: assert existing_test_has( ("synthetic", "dataset"), ("determin", "same seed", "reproduc"), ), ( "Synthetic dataset factory was not discovered and no existing deterministic " "synthetic-dataset test was found." ) return
> assert dataset_fingerprint(first) == dataset_fingerprint(second), ( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ "The same synthetic seed and configuration produced different datasets." )
tests/test_section14_required.py:157: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
dataset = {'input': array([[294, 0], [612, 0], [ 69, 1], [128, 2], [715, 0], [860, ..., 3]]), 'target': array([191]), 'relevant_positions': [14, 15], 'distractor_positions': [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, ...], ...} limit = 16
def dataset_fingerprint(dataset: Any, limit: int = 16) -> str: digest = hashlib.sha256() if hasattr(dataset, "__len__") and hasattr(dataset, "__getitem__"): count = min(int(len(dataset)), limit) for index in range(count): > digest.update(_stable_serialize(dataset[index])) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 0
tests/section14_runtime.py:886: KeyError

model = BudgetMemR( (recurrent_cell): GRUCell(8, 16) (key_projection): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=8, bias=False) ...ures=64, bias=True) (1): SiLU() (2): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=1, bias=True) (3): Sigmoid() ) ) seq_len = 10
def compatible_input(model: nn.Module, seq_len: int = 12) -> Tensor: failures: list[str] = [] attempted: set[tuple[tuple[int, ...], torch.dtype]] = set() inferred_dimensions: list[int] = []
def try_input(x: Tensor) -> Tensor | None: key = (tuple(x.shape), x.dtype) if key in attempted: return None attempted.add(key) try: reset_memory(model, require=False) with torch.no_grad(): invoke(model, x, reset=True) return x except Exception as exc: message = f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}" failures.append( f"shape={tuple(x.shape)}, dtype={x.dtype}: {message}" ) patterns = ( r"Expected input_dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"expected input[_ ]dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"input_dim\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", r"input_size\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", ) for pattern in patterns: match = re.search(pattern, message, flags=re.IGNORECASE) if match: inferred_dimensions.append(int(match.group(1))) return None
for candidate in _candidate_inputs(model, seq_len=seq_len): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
dimensions = list(dict.fromkeys([*inferred_dimensions, 8, 16, 32, 64])) for feature_dim in dimensions: for candidate in ( torch.randn(2, seq_len, feature_dim), torch.randn(seq_len, 2, feature_dim), ): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
> raise Section14DiscoveryError( "No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts:\n" + "\n".join(failures) ) E section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts: E shape=(2, 10), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(2, 10, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(10, 2), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(10, 2, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(2, 10, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one E shape=(10, 2, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one E shape=(2, 10, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(10, 2, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(2, 10, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64 E shape=(10, 2, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64

testcase.name: test_imdb_official_test_examples_are_not_in_train_or_validation
testcase.failure:
def test_imdb_official_test_examples_are_not_in_train_or_validation() -> None: root = REPO_ROOT / "data" / "processed" / "imdb" paths = { "train": root / "train" / "data.parquet", "validation": root / "validation" / "data.parquet", "test": root / "test_locked" / "data.parquet", } manifest_path = REPO_ROOT / "data" / "manifests" / "imdb_manifest.json" indices_path = REPO_ROOT / "data" / "manifests" / "imdb_split_indices.json"
required = [*paths.values(), manifest_path, indices_path] if not all(item.exists() for item in required): pytest.skip("IMDb data or provenance manifests are not all present")
train = pd.read_parquet(paths["train"], columns=["source_index"]) validation = pd.read_parquet( paths["validation"], columns=["source_index"], ) test = pd.read_parquet(paths["test"], columns=["source_index"])
manifest = yaml.safe_load(manifest_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) indices = yaml.safe_load(indices_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
> assert len(train) == 22500 E assert 22389 == 22500 E + where 22389 = len( source_index
0 1
1 2
2 3
3 4
4 ... 24994
22385 24995
22386 24997
22387 24998
22388 24999

[22389 rows x 1 columns])
